inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible ARIA name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that label the component.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component is disabled.

*Note:** A disabled component is completely noninteractive.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: The number of displayed rating symbols.

inputs.name: ratedIcon
inputs.description: Defines the icon to be displayed for the selected (filled) rating symbol.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component is read-only.

*Note:** A read-only component is not editable,
but still provides visual feedback upon user interaction.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Defines whether the component is required.

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Defines the size of the component.

inputs.name: tooltip
inputs.description: Defines the tooltip of the component.

inputs.name: unratedIcon
inputs.description: Defines the icon to be displayed for the unselected (empty) rating symbol.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
The indicated value of the rating.

*Note:** If you set a number which is not round, it would be shown as follows:

- 1.0 - 1.2 -> 1
- 1.3 - 1.7 -> 1.5
- 1.8 - 1.9 -> 2

outputs.name: ui5Change
outputs.description: The event is fired when the value changes.
